TIP Short Description: [SDN] nat hash table has no of reverse entry
N/A/che1-qz1-sr1-rk012-s28
TIP Situation: Observed service-error-nat_hash_no_rev in NAT
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-sdn:in-che::N/A:node:{{host_hostname}

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    sum by (agent_tag_cluster, host_hostname, agent_tag_crn_location)(increase(fabcon_nat_NatHashNoRev[1m])) > 100  = 120
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'in-che-prod01-zone1-zonelet01' and agent_tag_crn_location = 'in-che' and host_hostname = 'che1-qz1-sr1-rk012-s28'

Time:             12/10/2025 11:36 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/c4d3715d-0da1-4560-b427-a468361b4a5e?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F38640367%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [SDN]-nat_hash_no_rev
Description:  This alert is triggered when no reverse direction hash entry detected when forward entry exists is more than 100 in 1 min
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum by (agent_tag_cluster, host_hostname, agent_tag_crn_location)(increase(fabcon_nat_NatHashNoRev[1m])) > 100 
Duration: 30 m
